default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and logistics for AEO/GEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** A new `/guides` section will separate high-volume AEO/GEO content from the main blog, addressing Raj's quality concerns while enabling rapid publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [**AEO Measurement:** AEO volume is unquantifiable, so success will be measured directionally via referral traffic, brand searches, and overall SEO lift.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - **Topic Prioritization:** Focus on Reddit topics \#2 (AI tool gaps), \#3 (data cleaning), and \#5 (self-service analytics) for direct product relevance.
  - [**Contract Renewal:** Renewal is likely, but the 30-day opt-out deadline (\~Nov 3/4) requires a decision next week.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Publishing Model

  - [**Challenge:** Raj's quality concerns conflict with the high-volume content needed for AEO/GEO.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [**Solution:** A two-tier publishing model, inspired by the Augment customer example.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Main Blog:** Reserved for high-quality, product-centric content.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**`/guides` Section:** A new folder for high-volume AEO/GEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This structure meets SEO requirements (findable, linked, sitemapped) while allowing for rapid, unconstrained publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### AEO Measurement & Topic Prioritization

  - [**Challenge:** AEO volume is unquantifiable; no standard tools exist for prompt-based search data.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [**Solution:** Measure success directionally using a blend of signals:](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Referral traffic from AEO placements](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Brand search volume](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Overall SEO lift](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Topic Prioritization (from Reddit research):**](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - **High Priority:** Topics \#2 (AI tool gaps), \#3 (data cleaning), \#5 (self-service analytics) → Direct product relevance.
      - **Strategic Opportunity:** Topic \#1 (dashboard adoption) → Aligns with PR strategy by addressing analytics leader pain points (e.g., managing request backlogs).

### Logistics & Contract Renewal

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Recurring weekly call set for **Wednesdays at 9 AM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Contract Renewal:**](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Deadline:** 30-day opt-out is due around **November 3rd or 4th**.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Outlook:** Renewal is likely, as Cody believes Prophecy lacks the internal capacity to execute this strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [Propose the `/guides` section and sitemap plan to Will & Raj.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - Add a note to Notion prioritizing topics \#2, \#3, and \#5.
      - [Schedule the recurring Wednesday 9 AM Pacific meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [Deliver a V1 content strategy document by EOD Monday for review.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [Discuss the contract renewal deadline on next week's call.](https://fathom.video/share/cFbYxwFquiwMZs4yXDbXDyVs7ZNYwABQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

action_items.description: Email Will & Raj re: /guides + XML sitemap; request implementation
Comment in Notion re: dashboard adoption + topics 2, 3, 5
Send V1 strategy to Cody/Will; then present next call
Schedule recurring Wed 9am PT w/ Kyle & Will; confirm next call
Verify 30-day opt-out date; then discuss renewal on next call
